---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or change
labels: enhancement
---

## What

What would you like Atlas to do?

## Why

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Touches a restricted area?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes - search ranker / indexer / walker / artifact format

If yes, this issue is the discussion thread the project lead needs to see before any PR. See [CONTRIBUTING.md § Restricted areas](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#restricted-areas).
